template.name: Agent_ListClientThenSite (csv) v1.1
template.template_variables:
data_sources:
  agents:
    model: agent
    only:
      - site__client__name
      - site__name
      - hostname
      - operating_system
      - boot_time
      - offline_time
      - overdue_time
      - needs_reboot
    order_by: 
      - -site__client__name
      - site__name
      - hostname
    select_related:
      - site
      - site__client
